He handled my case relentlessly. He took on the insurance company's lawyers, the doctors, and did not stop until he got the  highest possible court award -(100%) permanent total disability. He has excellent knowledge of the law, and great command of the courtroom. I will definitely recommend this firm to anyone seeking a workers' compensation attorney.

reviews.text:
I am responding why gave this law firm 1 star. In the waiting area on the other side of office, I overheard the conversation between a client snd staff member. Staff member requesting payment and client responding.Staff member walked client to door and opened it for them.

My friend's interview was in the big conference room.that was in front of wait area. I too overheard the conversation between lawyer and my friend. Your lawyer did not want my elderly friend as a client. That is your firm's right. I do not have an issue with that.

After the interview was over no one helped my elderly friend who uses a cane to the door or or opened it for them.

You law firm needs to treat paying clients and potential clients with the same common courtesy . You need to sound proof your offices and conference room.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Estrada, we appreciate your candor and understand your concerns. We value your feedback
because if we fall short of our commitment to give our clients and anyone else who seeks our
guidance the highest possible service, we want to know about it so that we can do better the next
time. Thank you for calling attention to the lack of sufficient sound proofing in our front
conference room. In the future, when meeting with elderly clients with whom we must speak in
a louder voice, we will meet in our back conference room, which offers more privacy. While our
commitment is to assist EVERY potential client who needs our services, there are certain
circumstances under which the law forbids us from taking on the representation. Out of respect
for your friend’s privacy, I cannot divulge the particular reasons we could not legally take on the
representation in this case; however, regretfully, this was one of those circumstances in which
the ethical rules governing attorney/client relationships prevented us from taking the case. When
the meeting was concluded, our staff incorrectly assumed that your friend did not need assistance
to the door because you were there to assist him. That was an error in judgment. We apologize for
falling short in our customer service on this occasion and we will endeavor to do better in the
future. Respectfully, Paul Velasco
Thank you Steve!

His office is not responsive (possibly a tactic to make you pile up attorney fees on your end), and communication between Moisa and his client (my opposing party) was lackluster at best.

All in all, my attorneys threatened sanctions on multiple occasions in order to get this incompetent fool to submit documents into discovery. He hid behind the "my client hasn't produced this, but let me follow up" excuse.

If you're seeking an attorney, RUN, don't walk, away from this sleaze ball. If you have the misfortune, as did I, of having him as opposing counsel, I wish you good luck.

Justin created a living trust for my parents back in 2007. My parents both passed away, so it came time for me to take care of the estate.

My parents had gotten a reverse mortgage on the house, so of course I had to get a new loan on the house. I sent the lender a copy of the trust. She calls me back and tells me that the trust was never recorded, and was never transferred to the deed of the house.

Justin clearly didn't do his job and never recorded this with the county like he was supposed to. I called him numerous times, left messages, emailed him, you name it. He refused to return any of my calls.

What a horrible person. Now I am left to deal with this nightmare after losing both of my parents.
Justin gives great service and even better results! I would recommend him to anyone! Very happy!!

A True Blessing in a Time of Crisis

The Law Offices of Ronald M. Hall—Mr. Hall and Frank—are, without a doubt, the best legal team anyone could hope for.

In August 2024, my daughter and I found ourselves in a situation we had never imagined. She was involved in her first-ever DUI with a car accident that included bodily injury. It was a life-altering moment for both of us. As her mother, I was terrified, confused, and overwhelmed. We had no idea what to expect or how to handle what was coming.

That night and the following day, I contacted about eight different attorneys. None of them felt right—they were either negative right off the bat or quoted prices that were beyond unreasonable. Most of all, they didn’t give us hope.

Then I called the office of Ronald M. Hall. Frank answered the phone. From the very beginning, he was professional, kind, and reassuring. He immediately scheduled an appointment and told me not to worry—that everything would be okay. That moment alone gave me hope.

When we met Attorney Hall, he was nothing but positive and straightforward. He didn’t sugarcoat things, and he didn’t make empty promises—but he gave us confidence. He assured us that he would represent my daughter and fight for her, no matter what. And that’s exactly what he did.

Our case started as a misdemeanor, but because of the bodily injury, it was upgraded to a felony. I was afraid that Mr. Hall might back out or that this would change everything—but not once did he hesitate. He confidently continued to stand by us and fight for us in Superior Court.

Frank played a crucial role throughout the process, organizing all documents and making sure everything was presented clearly and professionally. He prepared a strong and thorough package for the court, the DA, and for Mr. Hall to work with. The level of care and attention they gave our case was nothing short of extraordinary.

Mr. Hall kept us informed after every court appearance. He explained every plea deal offered by the DA, never pressuring us—only making sure we were informed and comfortable. He never gave up on us, and he didn’t stop fighting until we received the best possible outcome.

Mr. Hall is not only incredibly experienced, but he is also highly respected within the court system—by judges, prosecutors, and everyone involved. That level of respect made a difference in our case.

Thanks to Attorney Ronald M. Hall and Frank, my daughter is not behind bars today. They were a true blessing during one of the hardest times of our lives, and I genuinely believe things would have gone much worse without them.

And it doesn’t end there.

Mr. Hall is still keeping all of our paperwork on file because, in a few years, when the time is right, he will be representing my daughter again to get this expunged from her record. That level of care and commitment is rare. They don’t just fight for you in the moment—they’re in it for the long run.

This really is the best team ever.

If you are ever in need of legal defense, I can’t recommend them enough. You will not regret having this amazing team by your side.

reviews.text: Frank is a godsend who helped us navigate our way through a complicated Chapter 7 Bankruptcy. To start from the beginning, I researched a lot of attorneys and found Frank to be the most personable. Moreover, his positive reviews and his vast knowledge of the bankruptcy judicial system impressed me. After a telephonic consultation and at Frank’s request, I provided documentation to him so he could have a better understanding of our predicament. Once Frank reviewed everything he was confident we would qualify for a Chapter 7. We put our complete trust into Frank and he did not let us down. As a result, we qualified for a Chapter 7 and are now able to move forward with our lives. The main point to take away from all this is, to do your part, whatever Frank needs you to do, do it. Listen to exactly what he has to say and ask whatever necessary questions you have. Though we may have asked repetitive questions, Frank never once made us feel dumb or inferior. He takes the time to thoroughly explain everything to ensure you know what the next step is and how to proceed. This was a stressful time in our lives and we could not have been successful without Frank. Bottom line, if you’re in a situation and not sure what path to take, Frank is the attorney for you and will not let you down.

Unfortunately, we found out later that the driver had low limits, and that our medical bills were already very high, but Brian was very insistent that we continue to get treatment, as my mother in law was still experiencing a lot of lingering pain, and once the bills came out, he and his team again went above and beyond to negotiate with all parties involved to make sure that everything was taken care of.

He didn’t just handle my case; he looked out for me. He checked on me, guided me, and made sure I was okay every step of the way. I could feel that he genuinely cared, and that meant everything during a time when I felt so vulnerable.

When it came time to fight for my case, Michael fought like someone who actually cared about my future. He pushed for what was fair, and the settlement he won for me lifted a weight I’d been carrying for so long. It gave me breathing room, stability, and peace I honestly didn’t think I’d get back.

I will always be grateful for him and not just for the outcome, but for the way he treated me through the whole process. If you’re going through something painful and you feel lost, Michael is the person you want in your corner. I can’t thank him enough for what he did for me.

I can’t say enough good things about Laura Krank. After 2½ years of fighting for my disability benefits and going through multiple appeals, she helped me finally get approved. My case originally started in Denver, and even with the distance and all the complications, she still stepped in and guided me every step of the way.

Because I’m young and have a very unique diagnosis, there were definitely hurdles in my case. But Laura never treated me like just another file. She truly cared, asked thoughtful questions, listened with empathy to what I’ve been through, and made me feel understood and supported during one of the hardest times in my life.

If you’re disabled and overwhelmed by the system, I genuinely recommend working with Laura. You deserve the benefits you qualify for, and having someone knowledgeable and compassionate on your side makes all the difference. Thank you, Laura, for fighting for me and helping me get the stability I needed.

They are very good at what they are doing.  Unlike other Law Offices I have contacted, This Law office was focused on helping me,  not focused on money to start. I want to mention that, the lawyer will speak to you more than 1 hour to explain all your questions which I felt rare in these days and I really appreciate and I wish you to continue to do this service for the community.  Dealing with any case never going to be straight forward all the time.  During my case, I had couple of unexpected forms to fill but they are not critical. They  did most of the heavy lifting I did some forms as well.

I just won my case , Thanks to Brian Shapiro. I've been years of fighting for disability and  a few lawyers later Brian  Shapiro only got it done. He's aggressive and don't let them sleep. Highly recommended . I also tell my friends who need it about him. It's a fight but always better with a great attorney at your side. Thank you Brian!

First and foremost finding the right attorney is a headache, you have no idea if any of the fancy advertisement is really true. So I did what you are doing right now, read through all the different opinions, results, and comments that others before me, had left in their reviews.
I personally ended up with attorney Monica Perales, and her assistant Evelyn Gil (Eve).
A social security disability case is a very slow moving process, and it’s a lot, let me just repeat that, it is a LOT of paperwork, some of it the attorney can get, however; many doctors are not making it easy, so I had to go back and forth in order to get what was needed.
Eve being the assistant was my go to person, any questions, or concerns, frustrations and anything in between was through her.
My case got denied at first when I submitted it myself, so for my appeal I needed the professional on my side, and ohhh man was that a good idea.
Now, Eve may not have been able to get back to me the same day, but she always responded back, she always had suggestions, support and encouragements, when I was losing my mind in this slow process, the SSA is a very slow moving machine.
A couple of weeks before my appeals hearing, Monica whet over my case with me, making sure I understood everything and east my mind.
At the hearing she knew exactly what to demand, and how to get the right people included, she got the judge to agree to a second hearing in order to have this people that would only benefit my case included, (there is zero chance I would ever have been able to pull that off myself).
About a month later my hearing was back on again, this time it was a slam dunk for me and Monica, it was 100 percent in my favor.
Afterwards Monica followed up with me a couple of times, just to make sure things were going the right way.
If you are looking for a great fighting team in a SSA case, ask for Monica Perales, I am very happy that I did.
Mónica párales did a great job. She made sure everything was on point when I went to the court. Monica is a beast 🙏🏻🙏🏻 she did amazing job. 🙏🏻💪🏼

We had no verbal communication with attorney of C.A. during my son's filing with SS.  Emails with no response from case manager C.A and we completed the forms.  In the end, my son recieved SSI but it wasn't for us calling SSI and the person overseeing my son's case, we would not have prevailed.  At the end of the day the lawfirm because we signed an agreement gets their share.  Lousy service so fee is not warranted.

The Law Offices of Lawrence D. Rohlfing are exceptionally great in providing the best Social Security related legal services. The reception office along with the case managers, paralegals, and attorney are responsive at explaining and clarifying specific questions deriving from their clients. From my personal standpoint, my case manager and my attorney were in constant contact with me in providing me the most recent updates that were up do date with my hearing for my SSI case. They were in constant contact with me via email and via mail providing to me updated notices about my case and requesting medical evidence from my medical providers that kept me actively cooperative with my case. I highly recommend seeking legal advise and legal advise from their offices to resolve your case due to them being able to walk you through the legal process with effective communication.

When we received the denial we we're told some things that could be done. Our question is why weren't they already a part of the original submission. For example there should have been a medical appointment review and instead of following up on our case and making sure it happened we found out after the fact. Because this is a serious and important issue for people in need of help we thought we should do a review.

Awesome staff and attorneys. Don't waste your time trying on your own better to.allow them to handle right from the start. Less frustration. Good company to work with. I couldn't ask for more.

reviews.text:
From the first moment my husband and I contacted DGO Legal to begin our marriage-based Green Card process, we knew we were in the best hands. We arrived full of uncertainty, with countless questions and no idea where to begin. It was a process that represented our future, our stability, and our life together. And honestly, we were scared.

But from day one, the DGO Legal team gave us absolute priority. The attention was immediate, personal, and extremely professional. They called us constantly, sent us detailed emails, clearly requested each document, and guided us step by step through absolutely everything. We never felt alone at any point in the process.

Something that truly impressed us was their level of efficiency and organization. We didn't expect such a meticulous, fast, and dedicated team. They paid attention to the smallest detail while building our case. Weeks later, they managed to construct a super solid, complete, and perfectly documented case, with everything required by USCIS. They took care of everything, including translations. Literally, we didn't have to worry about a thing.

Our initial anxiety was reduced to almost nothing because we knew our case was being handled by true professionals with in-depth knowledge of the immigration system. Abigail was present every step of the way, sending emails, calling us, guiding us when we didn't understand something, and asking for additional information when necessary. The communication was constant, and that was invaluable to us.

When, weeks later, we received the news that we had an interview with USCIS, the firm immediately contacted us and personally prepared us for that important moment. That preparation was key. It gave us peace of mind, confidence, and security. We went from being restless and nervous to feeling ready and poised to face the interview.

The day of the interview arrived. It lasted approximately an hour and flowed very smoothly. We had already practiced many of the questions with our lawyer, which made us feel supported even during the interview. We went prepared, calm, and confident.

After the interview, the officer informed us that our Green Card had been approved and that we could go celebrate. We left those offices overjoyed, with an emotion that's hard to put into words. It was a moment we'll never forget.

And most impressively, our Green Card was approved in just four months from the time the case was submitted to USCIS. Four months. Something that for many can take much longer, but with them, it was efficient and successful.

Without a doubt, we believe that DGO Legal is one of the best immigration law firms in the country. Not only because of the outcome, but also because of the way they work: with professionalism, commitment, compassion, and excellence.

We will hire them again for the removal of conditions on our 10-year Green Card and, later, for the citizenship process. Our confidence in them is absolute.

Our gratitude is boundless. We recommend them 100%.

If you are looking for a firm that will handle your case with responsibility, strategy, and genuine human support, don't hesitate. Choose them. They won't disappoint you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Cristal, for your kind words. We are thrilled to read your message and share in your joy at the result. We wish you all the best!

reviews.text:
Over the years, I have consulted immigration attorneys in different states across the United States. For some reason, I had the opportunity to meet with Attorney Gianfranco Girolamo, and I can personally attest to his honesty and sincerity.

He explained, without rushing, what the best course of action for my case would be and what options I had to move forward. This is the first time I have felt that an attorney is not only interested in signing a contract and receiving payment, but truly understanding the client’s case and needs.

I highly recommend him and I am certain we will work together again in the future. Thank you, Attorney Girolamo, for your time and sincerity.
Excellent service! They're a wonderful team, always attentive to any new developments and keeping us informed. We're so happy they represent us. Blessings 🙏🙏

Worst immigration service ever. I schedule a consulting call with Ariana and due to personal emergency I had to reschedule m. The calendar invite clearly provided an option to reschedule and her assistance calls repeatedly with rude language saying I’ll have to pay extra money for reschedule. Worst ever please avoid.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Rajath, thank you for your feedback. I’m sorry this felt frustrating, that’s never the experience we want for anyone.

To clarify respectfully: we allow one complimentary reschedule (emergencies can happen), and after reviewing your case, it appears there were multiple reschedule requests, which is why our team informed you of the additional fee. In any case, we processed a full refund to avoid any further inconvenience. That said, the way this was communicated clearly did not land well, and that is on us to improve.

If you’d like, please reach out to us directly at info@dgo.legal. We'd be happy to review your situation and make sure you feel properly taken care of.

We want to express our sincerest gratitude to DGO Legal for accompanying us throughout our immigration process. From the beginning, we experienced transparency, efficiency, and a human touch that brought us great peace of mind.

We especially want to acknowledge Julio Oyhanarte for his clarity and professionalism at every step; attorney Enid, who, in addition to her legal expertise, demonstrated extraordinary compassion; and attorney Arianna for her support along the way.

But above all, we want to thank legal assistant Abigail, who was like an angel to us: always attentive, patient, and with a warmth that made all the difference.

On behalf of Jonathan Goodman and Veronica Sosa, we testify that this process was a true miracle from God. We saw His favor in every detail, and today we can celebrate the fruit of these more than seven months of effort.

reviews.text:
English:
I had an amazing experience working with DGO Legal for our immigration process through USCIS. Gianfranco, our attorney, was not only knowledgeable but also personable, which made the whole process much less stressful. The team's communication was exceptional—Abigail, our point of contact, always kept us informed. Even when I couldn't reach them immediately, they were quick to respond via phone or email and happy to schedule a call. It was a relief to have a team that could support us in both English and Spanish, ensuring everything went smoothly. I highly recommend DGO Legal for their professionalism, accessibility, and bilingual support.

Spanish:

The team's communication was exceptional; Abigail, our point of contact, always kept us informed. Even when I couldn't reach them immediately, they responded quickly by phone or email and were willing to schedule a call. I highly recommend DGO Legal for their professionalism, accessibility, and bilingual support.

I had AJ Kotanjian to represent me after I was involved in a car accident on December 2024. From the very beginning, he was responsive and professional.

AJ Kotanjian guided me through the entire process, from filing the claim to negotiating with the insurance company. He always kept me informed, answered my questions, and explained everything in a way that was easy to understand.

Thanks to his hard work and expertise, I received a fair settlement that covered my medical bills and pain. I truly felt like he cared about what was best for me.

I would highly recommend AJ Kotanjian to anyone who has been in a car accident and needs a knowledgeable, trustworthy attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing such kind words. Glad we could help you out!

reviews.text: AJ Kotanjian did an incredible job handling my case. At the beginning of the process AJ clearly articulated how we would approach the case, what information he needed from me, timelines, and everything relevant to pushing for a successful outcome. He was an absolute professional and we were able to win the insurance claim from my cycling/car accident in less than 3 months which I was very surprised at given how long some of these trials/cases can go. I feel extremely fortunate to have hired him soon after I was injured, and was able to focus on healing and getting back to my life while he took care of everything else. Thank you AJ for your hard work and helping me get back on my feet!

I cannot say enough about the outstanding service I received from the Law Office of AJ Kotanjian. After being the victim of a hit-and-run accident, I was left injured and overwhelmed with medical bills, car repairs, and the stress of dealing with insurance companies. I reached out to this firm based on a recommendation, and I am so grateful that I did.

From the moment I contacted them, AJ and his team handled everything with professionalism, efficiency, and genuine care. They ensured I received the medical treatment I needed, arranged for my car to be repaired, and fought tirelessly to settle all issues with the insurance company. Their dedication and expertise turned a stressful situation into a smooth and manageable process.

Thanks to their hard work, I was able to focus on my recovery while they took care of all the legal complexities. If you are ever in need of a reliable, compassionate, and highly skilled legal team, I highly recommend the Law Office of AJ Kotanjian. They truly go above and beyond for their clients!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Elizabeth!  Your trust and faith in our firm meant everything to us.  It was a pleasure to represent you!

I cannot recommend the Law Offices of AJ Kotanjian highly enough for their exceptional legal expertise and unwavering support during our recent personal injury case. From the initial consultation to the successful resolution, they demonstrated a profound understanding of the complexities involved and guided us through every step with clarity and compassion.

AJ and his team were not only thorough in their approach but also incredibly responsive to all our concerns and inquiries. They ensured that we were well-informed about the progress of our case and provided realistic expectations from the outset. Their dedication and commitment to advocating for our rights were evident throughout the entire process.

Moreover, their negotiation skills were impressive, resulting in a settlement that exceeded our expectations. I truly felt that AJ fought tirelessly on my behalf, always keeping our best interests at heart.

If you find yourself in need of legal representation due to a personal injury, AJ Kotanjian is undoubtedly the attorney you want on your side. His professionalism, integrity, and genuine care for their clients set them apart. I am immensely grateful for the services and wouldn't hesitate to recommend to anyone seeking justice and compensation after an injury.

I definitely wouldn't recommend this law firm based on my experience with them. In my case, I added my wife to my U visa case, and since it began, they've made numerous mistakes. They might not care about each error, but I do, because it wastes time and delays my progress. Two days ago, they rejected my wife's case; perhaps they made another mistake. My case has been going on for a year and two months now. If you're considering hiring this firm, think twice. They may be very friendly, but that doesn't guarantee they'll do things properly. It seems like secretaries are handling everything. I've never met one of the lawyers, much less spoken with him. I think that has a lot to do with why things aren't going well. What a disappointment.

reviews.text: I'm calling to request an update on a refund they're owed me. I canceled a contract with them, and the contract states that it can be canceled at any time, with a deduction for the work they've already done—which makes sense, as they should take their fees. But I canceled the contract the very next day, and they told me they hadn't even started working yet. I canceled because they said my relative could go to court alone without a lawyer, and that if I wanted them to accompany me, they would, but they were asking for a lot of money. To this day, they're just playing games with me, making excuses. And how can they claim to help the community when they charge up to four times more than other lawyers? And on top of that, they want to keep money they haven't earned? I thought they were different!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Yuma,
At Diener Law, we value every opinion and take your feedback seriously. We would like to better understand what happened so we can improve and provide you with the attention you deserve.

reviews.text: I'll be very honest, a few years ago, around 2015, I opened a case with them. They worked very well on my case; I got my residency, then applied for citizenship, everything went great. And of course, since I liked the service, I recommended them to other people. They took on five more clients. They always told me they didn't like the service, that they didn't see the lawyer, that it was just the assistants they spoke to. They asked questions, and the assistants just answered that they didn't know anything, that you practically had to open a case, and that one of their lawyers would contact them. So now, I personally went back and wanted to open a case for my father-in-law, and the service was horrible. But I said, "Okay, I'll trust them," and I opened a case. I kept calling them; I wanted to know how I was going to fill out the medical documents because his doctor never wanted to fill them out. They never answered me or returned my calls. I also went to my brother's office and asked them about his case, and their answer was, "I don't know anything. Maybe his case will take six years." And I said, "Six years? If he already had an open case, you're supposed to know how far it's taken." His case is still pending, even though that's what they were paid for. All they told me was, "We don't know anything," and I told them it couldn't take six years—it's a petition for a citizen spouse. 🤦‍♀️🤦‍♀️ Honestly, they've put people to work in the offices who don't have the slightest clue about the law, inexperienced people. I paid for my father-in-law's case, called for a refund, canceled it, they never called me back for the refund, and they didn't lift a finger for his case. So I called the bank and reported them for fraud. I assure you, if I had spent more money, I would sue them and we would go to court. I was very disappointed with this lawyer; they don't work properly, and the employees are inexperienced. I wouldn't recommend them now…
reviews.ownerResponse:
We sincerely regret reading about your experience and understand your frustration. We appreciate you taking the time to share it in such detail, as your feedback is important and allows us to identify areas for improvement.

We are very sorry that the service did not meet your expectations this time, especially after having had a positive experience in the past. Our goal is always to provide clear, responsible service with appropriate follow-up, and we regret that we were unable to do so in your case.

We would like to thoroughly review this situation and follow up internally. We invite you to send us a private message through our social media channels so we can address your case with the seriousness and attention it deserves.

Thank you again for letting us know. Your opinion is important to us.

reviews.text: They contacted me to discuss my case. I waited an hour, and they said that this call was more important than me and that I could keep waiting. I told the woman, but she said I couldn't tell her I'd been waiting for over an hour, and she said, "If I tell her, they'll get mad at me and scold me." I mean, I haven't even had the appointment. I hired David in March 2024 for my divorce. Early in the case, I was granted full custody of my children, placing me in a strong legal position.
Despite that, I was advised to accept an agreement that reduced custody and resolved a restraining order against my ex to share custody, with the explanation that it would make me “look better” to the court. I followed that advice. In hindsight, it was a serious error.
That agreement eliminated the leverage I had and exposed me to renewed conflict and a subsequent DVRO based on many false claims later on. When additional issues arose as a direct consequence of that strategy, I was informed that continued representation would require a new and substantial payment. At that point, I was left dealing with the fallout of advice I already regretted, without meaningful support unless I could pay significantly more.
The guidance I received showed poor foresight and failed to account for the long-term consequences of surrendering protections that were already in place. In a case involving custody and high conflict, I expected judgment that prioritized stability and protection. That expectation was not met. I lost custody of my children as a result ultimately.
I regret relying on this attorney’s advice at a critical moment. Based on my experience, I would not recommend David to anyone who needs careful, long-term advocacy in a family law matter.

Don’t get me wrong; filing for bankruptcy feels terrifying but I promise you that this team knows what they’re doing and you’ll be in good hands. Definitely reach out to them!

I hired this law office for a Los Angeles County child custody matter in March 2024 and paid a $6,000 retainer. After the initial intake, communication became extremely difficult.

On 10/24/2025, I was told a refund would be issued and that an assistant would contact me. To date, I have not received a refund and I have never received an itemized billing/accounting for the $6,000.

I try getting in contact with him but  my calls were repeatedly routed through a call center with the same response: “leave a message and he will call you back.” I left multiple messages and did not receive return calls.

After I posted a negative review on yelp, the attorney called me the same day I posted the review and offered to refund $3,000 if I deleted the review. I declined because I am requesting a full refund and a complete accounting. During that call, he said he would call me back and then the call ended, and I never received the call back.

I recommend future clients get everything in writing, request an itemized accounting early, and keep a detailed communication log.

reviews.text:
My husband and I found ourselves in a very difficult financial situation; one brought on by the unexpected curveballs life can throw. Together, we were facing over $80,000 in debt, and at the time, it felt like there was no way out.

After doing some research, we realized that bankruptcy isn’t as frightening or life-limiting as we had imagined. It doesn’t mean you can’t buy a home, a car, or rebuild your credit. In fact, it can be a fresh start. After browsing through more than 50 different firms, we discovered Resolve Law Firm, and from the first interaction, we knew we had found the right team.

Their reviews were outstanding, and they lived up to every word. They were quick to reach out, incredibly knowledgeable, and genuinely reassuring. They helped us understand that filing for bankruptcy wasn’t the end; it was the beginning of a new chapter. Their communication was clear, direct, and compassionate. No question was too small, and every concern was met with patience and guidance.

From start to finish, the process took about four months. After our 341 meeting, it felt like an enormous weight had been lifted off our shoulders. For the first time in a long time, we saw a future filled with possibility.

Thanks to Resolve, our family has been given a second chance. Our hope has been restored, and we now carry the financial wisdom to make better choices moving forward.

If you’re feeling overwhelmed or unsure about your options, don’t hesitate; reach out to Resolve Law Firm. Even if you just have questions, they’re there to help. We’re beyond grateful that we did. You will be too.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your story and for your incredibly thoughtful words. We know how overwhelming and emotional it can be to face financial hardship, and it means the world to us that you trusted Resolve Law Firm to help guide you through such a pivotal time.

It’s our mission to ensure every client feels supported, informed, and empowered from beginning to end. Knowing that we were able to help lift the burden and restore hope for you and your family is exactly why we do what we do.

We're honored to have played a part in your fresh start, and we truly admire your courage and resilience. If you ever need us in the future—or just want to check in—we’re always here for you.

Wishing you continued success and peace on this next chapter!

—The Team at Resolve Law Firm

As a colleague in the legal profession, I can confidently say that their expertise and dedication to their clients are truly commendable.

Stein & Markus have demonstrated an impressive ability to navigate complex legal issues, particularly those surrounding the new legislation, SB 1437, which addresses the felony murder rule. They have been at the forefront of this legal transformation, successfully advocating for clients and achieving reversed sentences for those unfairly impacted by outdated laws. Their commitment to justice and the rights of their clients is evident in every case they take on.

The attorneys at Stein & Markus approach each case with a strategic mindset, ensuring that they explore every possible avenue for their clients. Their thorough research, clear communication, and empathetic client relations create a supportive environment for individuals facing serious criminal charges.

I wholeheartedly recommend The Law Office of Stein & Markus to anyone seeking robust legal representation in criminal defense. Their track record, particularly in cases related to SB 1437, highlights their ability to bring about significant change and deliver justice for their clients.

By the grace of god, I found Andrew Stein, of Stein & Markus Law. I was very impressed! He was such a friendly and approachable man. Andrew was very well educated in the SB 1437 bill. He and Joe Markus were patient and very straight forward which I appreciated. After careful review & deliberation of my husband Billy Juarez 2002 Case, Stein & Markus Agreed to Represent my Husband for the 2019 SB 1437 case in Riverside County. They were aggressive, and stead fast during court filings. They kept me informed about each step of the process. After 19 years of incarceration, Stein & Markus WON the resentencing filing allowing my husband to come home! They have given my husband Billy a beautiful second chance at life.
He has now been home almost 5 years and I am so proud to say he is a family man and a law abiding productive member of society.
I can not thank Stein & Markus Enough for their hard work, dedication and law expertise resulting in not only my husband Billy's Return home but for the 60 other Individuals they have since brought home! We are forever grateful to Andrew, Joe and Staff!

My brother had an accident. He works up to 12 hours a day and doesn’t have time to deal with anything. He trusted Sailer Law Firm to get the best possible compensation for his injury. For three months, he went to the chiropractor, came home later than usual, and even had to go on his days off (Saturdays). The compensation he received for the incident is shameful and doesn’t even come close to making up for the time he lost, the stress and worry he went through, and the extra expenses he had because of the incident. Worst of all, the lawyers didn’t even make an effort to get more, nor did they explain anything to him. They simply told him “You’re going to get this amount,” and that was it.
They are a disgrace.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Park, I am sorry to hear your brother was not satisfied with the outcome of his case. Ethically, I cannot speak to the particular facts of his case in a public forum; however, I will say that Attorneys nor Law Firms can guarantee the outcome of any case. Unfortunately, the media, online marketing, national law firms with huge budgets, billboard attorneys and the like perpetuate the idea that any accident cases is worth huge amounts of money to get their phones to ring. But try speaking to the actual attorney you see on TV, the Billboard or hear on the radio.
In the real world if a client decides to settle his case the outcome is based on the last best and final offer from the insurance company. If the case goes to trial the outcome is based on a Jury verdict after trial. An experienced attorney must assess the damages involved in each individual case. Some cases worth going to trial, in other cases the costs associated with the trail outweigh the potential recovery. Without disclosing more than you have already said in this public forum "three months of chiropractic" typically would not justify the cost of taking a case to trial if the case can be settled. I do however appreciate that your brother acknowledged that my office was able to get a Chiropractor to stay open late and come in on Saturdays to accommodate his work schedule and get him healthy after this accident.
I am more than happy to discuss the facts of this case should your brother formally authorize my office to speak to you. Alternatively, I wish you well and hope you feel better for having vented your concerns. I can be reached at 562-945-4911 or if you prefer email rich@sailerlawfirm.com -Rich Sailer

reviews.text: I am so happy to finally be able to sort out my immigration paperwork, which took 19 years. I longed so much to go back to my homeland, Guatemala, and see my parents and enjoy their company. My case was moving very slowly and was difficult. I was recommended the lawyer Francis, and she guided me step by step, not only me but also my brother, who had been deported and was having a lot of trouble returning. Thanks to God and the lawyer's experience, my brother returned a year ago, and this year, 2026, I traveled to my consular appointment. Everything went very well, and in three days they told me to pick up my passport with the visa. I enjoyed seeing my parents and my Guatemala, and now I can travel freely. I thought it would never happen, but dreams do come true, and with God's help and the guidance of a good lawyer like Francis Enrique, it's even better. Schedule an appointment with her; your case will be successful, and you can achieve your dream and your family's dream. You won't regret it; I highly recommend her.

reviews.text: My name is Jose Flores and I arrived to this country in 1989. It's been a long journey since then. Initially, I sought legal help, but I was scammed and deceived by several lawyers. A friend told me about attorney Francis Henriquez. I made an appointment, and when she reviewed my paperwork, she saw that it was a complete mess, full of errors and bad work. She took my case and guided me step by step. It took many years, including waivers for deportations and illegal stay as well as delays due to USCIS closures because of Covid. But finally, I had an appointment at the consulate in Ciudad Juárez. The lawver and her team prepared me for the interview, and everything went exactly as they said it would. Finally, this December 2025, I obtained my residency. Based on my experience, I highly recommend attorney Francis Henriquez and her team. They go above and beyond to successfully handle all of their clients' cases. Thank you attorney for your effort, time, and dedication during these very difficult times for our community. May God continue to guide you and give you wisdom to succeed with all your cases.
